debug_info.goal:
a : ℕ+ → ℤ
hi : ∀ (j : ℕ+), 1 ≤ a j ∧ a j ≤ 2015
hii : ∀ (l k : ℕ+), 1 ≤ k ∧ k < l → ↑↑k + a k ≠ ↑↑l + a l
⊢ ∃ b N, ∀ (m n : ℕ+), m < n ∧ N ≤ m → |∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - ↑↑b)| ≤ 1007 ^ 2

    have := Finset.sum_le_sum (s := Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) (f := fun j => abs (a j - (1 : ℕ+)))
      (g := fun _ => (2014 : ℤ)) (by intro j hj; exact hbound j)
    simpa [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] using this
  have hcard : (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) ≤ (1007 : ℤ) := by

classical
  refine ⟨1, 1, ?_⟩
  intro m n h
  have hm : (m : ℤ) ≤ n := by
    exact_mod_cast (le_of_lt h.1)
  have hsum :
      (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - (1 : ℕ+))) =
        (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, a j) - (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) := by
    simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const, add_comm, add_left_comm,
      add_assoc]
  have hcard :
      Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) = (n : ℕ) - (m : ℕ) := by
    simpa using (Finset.card_Icc (m + 1) n)
  have hbound_each : ∀ j : ℕ+, j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n → abs (a j - (1 : ℕ+)) ≤ (2014 : ℤ) := by
    intro j hj
    have hj1 := hi j
    have : 0 ≤ a j - (1 : ℕ+):ℤ := by
      have : (1 : ℤ) ≤ a j := hj1.1
      linarith
    have : a j - (1 : ℕ+) ≤ (2014 : ℤ) := by
      have : a j ≤ 2015 := hj1.2
      norm_num at this
      linarith
    have : abs (a j - (1 : ℕ+)) = (a j - (1 : ℕ+)) := by
      exact abs_of_nonneg this
    simp [this, this]
  have habs_sum_le :
      abs (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - (1 : ℕ+))) ≤ (2014 : ℤ) * (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) := by
    have := Finset.abs_sum_le_sum_abs (s := Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) (f := fun j => a j - (1 : ℕ+))
    have h' :
        (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, abs (a j - (1 : ℕ+))) ≤
          ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (2014 : ℤ) := by
      refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
      intro j hj
      exact hbound_each j hj
    have h'' :
        (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (2014 : ℤ)) = (2014 : ℤ) * (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) := by
      simp [Finset.sum_const, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
    have : abs (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - (1 : ℕ+))) ≤
        ∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, abs (a j - (1 : ℕ+)) := by
      simpa using this
    exact le_trans this (le_trans h' (le_of_eq h''))
  have : abs (∑ j ∈ Finset.Icc (m + 1) n, (a j - (1 : ℕ+))) ≤ (1007 ^ 2 : ℤ) := by
    have hcard_nonneg : 0 ≤ (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _)
    have hcard_le : (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) ≤ (1007 : ℤ) := by
      have : (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℕ) ≤ 1007 := by
        have := Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le ?_ (Nat.le_of_lt_succ (Nat.lt_succ_self _)))
        · exact this
        · have : (m : ℕ) + 1 ≤ (n : ℕ) + 1 := by
            exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.le_of_lt (by exact_mod_cast h.1))
          exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.lt_succ_self _) this
      exact_mod_cast this
    have hmul_le : (2014 : ℤ) * (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) ≤ (1007 ^ 2 : ℤ) := by
      have : (2014 : ℤ) * (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) ≤ (2014 : ℤ) * (1007 : ℤ) := by
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left hcard_le (by norm_num)
      have : (2014 : ℤ) * (Finset.card (Finset.Icc (m + 1) n) : ℤ) ≤ (2014 : ℤ) * (1007 : ℤ) := this
      have hnum : (2014 : ℤ) * (1007 : ℤ) ≤ (1007 ^ 2 : ℤ) := by

    exact le_trans habs_sum_le hmul_le
